programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep114: Shark Divers Part 2
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep41: Kayaking The Mighty Rivers of Africa
programme.desc: The world’s top kayakers travel Africa in search of the most dangerous whitewater. Shot over the course of a year, this episode highlights the travel and adventure of world-class kayakers as they embark on a “bigger and better” hunt for the largest waterfalls in a land where emergency services are virtually non-existent.

programme.title: Blue World Ep612: Global Search for the Rare Dugongs + Cave Diving in Florida, USA
programme.desc: Blue World travels the world on a hunt for Dugongs… rare, shy animals resembling manatees that are very difficult to film. But we get lucky in the Philippines with an incredible once-in-a-lifetime encounter! Then, an amazing cave dive at Peacock Springs in Florida, where Blue World divers do their first “traverse”.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep306: Team Sailing Championships + Kitefoil Grand Prix + European Sailing Championships - Austria
programme.desc: This episode of World of Watersports highlights the Red Bull Sailing Team on Lake Constance near the German/Austria border, the Kitefoil Grand Prix in Traunsee, Austria, and the European Sailing Championships in Attersee, Austria.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep209: Outriggers and Stand-Up Paddling in Tahiti
programme.desc: We paddle an outrigger around the islands of Moorea, and then challenge Tahiti's epic surf breaks on stand-up paddleboards.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Blue World Ep401: Maldives Manta Ray Feeding Frenzy + Venomous Sea Snakes
programme.desc: Blue World travels to the Maldives to witness a huge Manta ray feeding frenzy and then visits Indonesia to explore an island surrounded by venomous sea snakes!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep105: V8 Superboat Championships from Griffith in New South Wales, Australia
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 5 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Father Daughter Miracle Mile
programme.desc: Curtis and Autumn have an epic Father's Day on Wyoming's most famous Miracle Mile with Ugly Bug Fly Shop.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep101: Shark Business
programme.desc: Shark Business unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Dopamine
programme.desc: Dopamine is a naturally occurring chemical produced by the human brain, which controls movement and reward. In the world of progressive snowboarding, the joy of physical movement and the reward of being outside are the two greatest factors motivating riders to evolve and innovate. The Absinthe Films documentary Dopamine captures professional snowboarders pushing boundaries and chasing storms across the Chilkats, Valhallas, Monashees, Dolomites, and Pyrenees mountains.

programme.title: La Zone
programme.desc:
In the early 2000's, snowboard filmer David 'Vlad' Vladyka and a handful of riders discovered an off-the-radar area on the French-Swiss border that held massive potential for shooting freestyle snowboarding. The mountain pass featured rolling terrain punctuated by steep roll overs that are perfect for building jumps. The area was Le Col de Cou, and though it had a name, the riders called it 'La Zone', a purposefully vague nickname that would help them keep the area a secret.
Over the next decade, La Zone would become one of the most productive and standard setting locations for filming freestyle snowboarding in all of Europe. Shots from La Zone were featured in several Absinthe films, and many others.
Now 20 years later, Jones team rider Mat Schaer and Vlad still return to La Zone to film from time to time, but the pristine slopes they enjoyed in the past are much harder to find as Le Col de Cou has become a popular ski touring destination.
Featuring new and historic footage from La Zone, this new short film directed by Julien Rosens, and produced by Absinthe Films, highlights the history, beauty and inevitable evolution of this legendary shred spot.
Credits LA ZONE, a movie directed by Julien Roserens Produced by Absinthe Films Supported by Jonessnowboards, Region Dents du Midi, Doodah store Edited by Jules Guarneri Soundmix by Stephane Chapelle Graphics by René Zumstein Photo by Michael Cordey Music : Tugrul by Ochre, Rhea by Yehezkel Raz, Where It Beginns It Ends by Be Still The Earth, Strange Life de YGGL, Let Us Get Out by Redder

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 01
programme.desc: Kimmy Fasani is a world class athlete, a loving mother, a natural leader, and a true champion of women in professional snowboarding. In Episode 1 of her Microdose series, we learn where Fasani’s glorious story begins. Featuring Shannon Dunn, Donna Carpenter, Hana Beaman, Gabe Taylor and Ryan Runke.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 02

programme.title: MICRODOSE Kimmy Fasani - Dose 03
programme.desc: As a Burton athlete, Kimmy Fasani has long been a champion of change in women's snowboarding. Innovative products. Fair pay. Better contracts. Sick ripping. Watch and be uplifted. programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever

programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 6
programme.desc: For its sixth season, the ultra-high performance one design catamarans, once again visited five top venues across the world. Each location selected particularly for its ideal weather conditions - stable winds and flat waters - perfect for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at speeds of over 30 knots. Earlier in 2019, intensive discussions and decisions took place within the teams with many deciding to focus their efforts for the upcoming season, on the GC32 Racing Tour. This season the tour welcomed some new teams as well as many familiar regular GC32 crews. In total 12 teams from 9 different counties came together to take part in the 6th GC32 Racing Tour. Amongst them, some of the most well-known professional sailors in the world.

programme.title: Journey To Giglio
programme.desc: On January of 2012 the Italian cruise ship Costa Concordia sank in shallow waters after striking an underwater rock off Isola del Giglio. Many things remained unclear about this tragedy, so Andi van Zyl is set to discover the truth regarding this incident.Journey to Giglio is an investigative piece on the infamous Costa Concordia tragedy. Andi van Zyl is on the Italian island of Giglio for an exclusive exposé on the shipwreck that shocked the world. She will leave no rock unturned as she digs into what happened the night of the accident and uncovers the disaster’s impact on the local residents and economy.Highlights include exploration of the island and disaster site, and an interview with the man at the helm of the salvage operation, Nick Sloane. Andi sits down with the fellow South African to discuss the delicate process of freeing the wrecked cruise-liner from the reef without spoiling the pristine waters of Giglio Island.Find out the mystery behind the sinking of Costa Concordia on this Journey to Giglio.

programme.title: Eurosaf Championship Tavira
programme.desc: The EUROSAF (European Sailing Federation) Championship will take place in the waters off the Portuguese town of Tavira. The 19 sailing champions of Europe will be crowned in this gathering that has over 150 sailors and more than 100 boats and boards compete against triumph. 14 European countries have sent their best sailors to compete in eight different disciplines, including single-handed and double-handed dinghies, plus sailboards and high performance dinghy. They will compete over the 5-day competition to choose the youth champion of Europe in each of these disciplines. Follow the competition of the future talent of the sailing world as they sail across the waters of Tavira, on Nautical Channel.

programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: El Campeón
programme.desc: LA HISTORIA DE UNA PROMESA DEL BOXEO, SU ENTRENADOR SOLO LO USA PARA BENEFICIO PROPIO. LA FAMA Y EL DINERO SOLO LE TRAE PROBLEMAS, ADEMAS QUE SUFAMILIA SE APROVECHA DE EL.

programme.title: Gritos del Monday
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de Ingeniería Ambiental realizan un trabajo en la Reserva Ecológica de los Saltos del Monday, conocido por su rica fauna y su rica historia. Para el trabajo, los alumnos deciden acampar en el lugar, en medio de la obscura noche son sorprendidos por un hecho que desencadenará a lo largo de sus días posteriores, en especial a una de las estudiantes.

programme.title: Choele
programme.desc: Todo ocurre en el pueblo de Choele Choel, provincia de Río Negro. Un niño y su padre intentan seguir juntos todo el verano, pero el chico ya decidió partir hacia otro lugar con su madre, cuando ésta llegue y le recoja. A la zona donde viven llega una chica, por la que comienzan a competir padre e hijo.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
